description:
Currently MAX_PHASE_REWORKS=3 is a global constant in lifecycle_executor.rs. Different phases need different retry budgets: requirements is cheap to retry, implementation is expensive.

Changes needed:
1. Add to WorkflowPhaseConfig in workflow_config.rs:
   - max_attempts: Option<u32> (defaults to 3 for backward compat)
   - retry_backoff: Option<BackoffConfig> { initial_secs: u64, factor: f64, max_secs: Option<u64> }
2. Replace MAX_PHASE_REWORKS constant usage in lifecycle_executor.rs with per-phase max_attempts lookup
3. Apply backoff delay between rework attempts (delay = min(initial_secs * factor^attempt, max_secs))
4. Update rework budget guard in state machine engine to use per-phase config
5. Add tests: phase with max_attempts=1 fails immediately on rework, phase with max_attempts=5 allows more retries

Key files:
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow_config.rs
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow/lifecycle_executor.rs (MAX_PHASE_REWORKS usage)
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/state_machines/engine.rs (guard evaluation)
title: Add per-phase retry config (max_attempts, retry_backoff) to pipeline definition
